site.subtitle: A privacy-free, multi-device content sharing tool
site.tagline: NEON DROP · ZERO TRACE · ONE TAP SHARE
site.footer_slogan: 「 Links come and go, no trace need remain 」
text.label: Share content
text.placeholder: Paste any text / note / code snippet...
url.label: URL
file.label: Choose file (max 100 MB)
file.drop_hint: Click to choose or drag a file here
expire.label: Expiry time
burn.hint: The first reader will destroy this immediately
burn.hint_file: The first viewer/downloader will destroy this
burn.confirm_body_text:
The first reader will see this message and it will instantly become "burned".

It will be permanently deleted 30 days after the original expiry time.

Continue?
burn.confirm_body_url:
The first opener of this URL will trigger the message to instantly become "burned".

It will be permanently deleted 30 days after the original expiry time.

Continue?
burn.confirm_body_file:
The first person to download this file will trigger it to instantly become "burned".

It will be permanently deleted 30 days after the original expiry time.

Continue?

result.title: ✓ Share created
storage.label: ⚡ Storage · live monitor
view.not_found: ❌ Share not found or permanently deleted
view.not_found_hint: This share may have expired and been deleted over 30 days ago
view.burn_warning_body:
This is a burn-after-read message
The content will vanish immediately after you read it and cannot be recovered
Please make sure you are ready to receive it
view.burn_countdown_hint: This message will be deleted in
view.burned_banner_sub: Burn after read — destroyed after the first viewer
view.expired_banner_sub: Content is masked and permanently deleted after 30 days
error.empty: Content or file cannot be empty
error.storage_full: Storage is full (5 GB), cannot create new share
error.storage_full_file: Upload exceeded the 5 GB total limit
